ARCHIVE_LIBRARY_POWER_HP_MODIFIER.title: HP Up
ARCHIVE_LIBRARY_POWER_HP_MODIFIER.descri: Deals damage equal to stacks at end of turn, then removes this effect
ARCHIVE_LIBRARY_POWER_HP_MODIFIER.smartD: Deals [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage at end of turn, then removes this effect
ARCHIVE_LIBRARY_POWER_DAMAGE_RATIO_MODIF: When taking attack damage, reduces damage taken per stack
When taking attack damage, increases damage taken per stack
When taking attack damage, {Amount:cond:>0?reduces|increases} damage taken by [blue]{TotalPercent}%[/blue]
ARCHIVE_LIBRARY_POWER_DEFENSE_MODIFIER.d: Increases block gained by the unit
Decreases block gained by the unit
ARCHIVE_LIBRARY_POWER_CRITICAL_DAMAGE_RE: Increases the unit's [gold]Critical Hit Damage Resistance[/gold]
Decreases the unit's [gold]Critical Hit Damage Resistance[/gold]
ARCHIVE_LIBRARY_POWER_SHIELD_BENEFIT.des:
Blocks all types of damage
Stacks are consumed by incoming damage
Shatters when depleted
Some buff effects can bypass this entirely
ARCHIVE_LIBRARY_POWER_SHIELD_BENEFIT.sma:
Blocks all types of damage
Currently blocks [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage
Shatters when depleted
Some buff effects can bypass this entirely
ARCHIVE_LIBRARY_POWER_HEAL_BY_HIT_BENEFI:
When the holder takes damage, heals for equal stacks
Consumes [green]1[/green] stack per proc

When the holder takes damage, heals for [blue]{Amount}[/blue]
Remaining charges: [green]{Charges}[/green]
ARCHIVE_LIBRARY_POWER_PENETRATION_BENEFI:
Each stack pierces [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold] on attack
If [gold]Armor Pierce[/gold] exceeds [gold]Shield[/gold] stacks, ignores [gold]Shield[/gold]

Pierces [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold] on attack
If [gold]Armor Pierce[/gold] exceeds [gold]Shield[/gold] stacks, ignores [gold]Shield[/gold]
ARCHIVE_LIBRARY_POWER_CRITICAL_CHANCE_BE:
Increases the unit's [gold]Critical Hit[/gold] chance
[gold]Critical Hits[/gold] deal double damage
Can be modified by [gold]Crit Damage[/gold] effects

Increases [gold]Critical Hit[/gold] chance
Attacks have [blue]{TotalPercent}%[/blue] chance to [gold]crit[/gold]
[gold]Crit[/gold] damage increased by [blue]{CritBonusPercent}%[/blue]
ARCHIVE_LIBRARY_POWER_DAMAGE_CAP_BENEFIT: The holder can take at most [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage from a single hit
The holder can take at most [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage from a single hit
ARCHIVE_LIBRARY_POWER_EX_COST_REDUCTION_:
Reduces the cost of the holder's cards
Cost is halved (rounded down)
Consumes one stack on play
ARCHIVE_LIBRARY_POWER_COST_OVERLOAD_BENE: Overdrawn energy is deducted from next turn's energy refresh

Overdrawn energy is deducted from next turn's energy refresh
Remaining debt: [blue]{Amount}[/blue]

Deals damage equal to stacks at end of turn
Stacks are then halved (rounded down)
